{What the improvement is, in one sentence}

**Where it would land**

**Who benefits**
{Which persona — CSM / engineer / analyst / etc. — and what changes for them}

**Why this belongs upstream vs. in your fork**
{If it's team-specific, it probably belongs in your fork. If it teaches a pattern other teams would use, upstream.}

{Optional: a markdown sketch of the new file / section}
